vit_dr.topic: Vision Transformer for automated diabetic retinopathy grading from fundus images
vit_dr.blocked_root_cause: tailor_gate rule cap (final_review_gate repair loop re-triggered tailor_gate to round_idx=2); LLM converged in rounds 0+1 but rule cap hit

xlm_r.topic: Cross-lingual transfer learning for low-resource African languages with XLM-R
xlm_r.seed_audit_gate_root_cause: S1 (BERT) title mismatch and existence_status='ambiguous' persists (WP2 scope)
xlm_r.blocked_root_cause: seed_audit_gate independently blocked (S1 BERT title mismatch) — WP2 scope

yolo_steel.topic: YOLOv8 for real-time steel surface defect detection on NEU-DET dataset
yolo_steel.seed_audit_gate_root_cause: S2 (Song & Yan 2013) existence_status='ambiguous' with no stable identifier (WP2 scope)
yolo_steel.blocked_root_cause: seed_audit_gate independently blocked (S2 ambiguous) — WP2 scope; tailor_gate converged at round_idx=1 (LLM pass)

subtask_14_1_no_empty_field_blocked.reason: All 3 cases have BLOCKED rationales attributable to gate/seed/novelty issues, NOT to empty input fields. vit_dr: 'tailor unresolved' (rule cap). xlm_r: 'seed audit unresolved' (S1 BERT title mismatch). yolo_steel: 'seed audit unresolved' (S2 Song&Yan ambiguous). No case cites 'task_definition empty' / 'method_summary empty' / 'core_method empty' as the BLOCKED cause. Note: tailored_method_summary.core_method is empty string ('') in all 3 cases, but this is NOT the cited BLOCKED cause — fused_verdict_rationale explicitly references gate/seed/novelty. The field-empty condition was the WP3 Task 13 root cause (resolved by commit 21f0ed73 option C schema extension); it is no longer the BLOCKED trigger.

subtask_14_2_at_least_2_of_3_conditional.reason: 0/3 cases reached CONDITIONAL/RISKY/GO. All 3 cases have fused_verdict=BLOCKED. vit_dr: BLOCKED (tailor_gate rule cap). xlm_r: BLOCKED (seed_audit_gate unresolved — WP2 scope). yolo_steel: BLOCKED (seed_audit_gate unresolved — WP2 scope, even though tailor_gate converged pass at round_idx=1). Expected FAIL per WP1 round 4 data: seed_audit_gate independent BLOCKED is WP2 scope.
subtask_14_2_at_least_2_of_3_conditional.wp2_scope_note: WP2 scope, non-blocking for Re8.1. xlm_r and yolo_steel are independently blocked by seed_audit_gate (S1 BERT title mismatch / S2 Song&Yan ambiguous). vit_dr is blocked by tailor_gate rule cap (final_review_gate repair loop re-triggering). Even with WP3 Task 13 schema extension and WP1 round 4 prompt fix, fused_verdict stays BLOCKED until seed_audit_gate passes (WP2 deliverable).

subtask_14_3_at_least_1_of_3_quality_pas.reason: 0/3 cases have quality_pass=true. All 3 cases have quality_pass=false because fused_verdict=BLOCKED (quality_pass is hard-coded false when fused_verdict=BLOCKED per _compute_quality_pass Check 4). Expected FAIL per WP1 round 4 data.
subtask_14_3_at_least_1_of_3_quality_pas.wp2_scope_note: WP2 scope, non-blocking for Re8.1. quality_pass is downstream of fused_verdict; until seed_audit_gate passes in WP2, fused_verdict stays BLOCKED and quality_pass stays false. The _compute_quality_pass logic is correct (SubTask 14.6 verifies the hard constraint).

subtask_14_4_satisfied_gap_has_evidence_.reason: All 15 satisfied gaps across 3 cases have at least one search_step with matching gap_id and non-zero evidence_delta (n_new_papers > 0 or n_new_repos > 0). Traceability is complete.

subtask_14_5_novelty_tailor_lowbar_consi.reason: All 3 cases show internally consistent novelty/tailor/low_bar signals under the _compute_fused_verdict rule precedence (Rule 1-3 unresolved BLOCKED > Rule 4 RISKY > Rule 5 CONDITIONAL > Rule 7 GO). No conflicts detected. Each case's fused_verdict correctly reflects the highest-priority rule that fires.

yolo_steel.fired_rule: Rule 1 (seed_audit_gate unresolved -> BLOCKED); Rule 4 (novelty reject + tailor GO -> RISKY) would have fired if seed_audit passed
yolo_steel.consistency: consistent — RISKY signal (novelty reject + tailor pass) is overridden by higher-priority seed_audit BLOCKED; low_bar=blocked reinforces BLOCKED semantics

subtask_14_6_no_quality_pass_true_with_b.reason: No case exhibits quality_pass=true with fused_verdict=BLOCKED. The hard constraint from project_memory ('quality_pass must be false if fused_verdict is BLOCKED') is enforced by _compute_quality_pass Check 4 in re80_seeded_demo.py line 303-308: `if fused_verdict == 'BLOCKED': reasons.append('fused_verdict is BLOCKED (quality_pass cannot be true when the pipeline is blocked)')`. All 3 cases correctly have quality_pass=false + fused_verdict=BLOCKED.

subtask_14_7_fused_verdict_rules_correct.reason: _compute_fused_verdict in apps/api/app/services/agents/graph/nodes/content.py:585-652 implements the 8-rule decision cascade consistent with the spec. The 4 spec-required rules are correctly encoded: GO (Rule 7) requires all gates=pass + novelty=accepted + no open critical gaps. CONDITIONAL (Rule 5/6/8) covers gate revise / open critical gaps / default. RISKY (Rule 4) requires novelty=reject AND tailor_verdict=GO. BLOCKED (Rule 1-3) covers seed_audit/tailor/final_review gate unresolved. Rule precedence is correct (unresolved BLOCKED > RISKY > CONDITIONAL revise > CONDITIONAL critical gaps > GO). Note: low_bar is NOT checked in _compute_fused_verdict — it is handled by _compute_final_verdict (separate function, lines 438-500) which produces GO/CONDITIONAL/RISKY/PIVOT/STOP. This is a deliberate design separation: fused_verdict focuses on gate+novelty+gap fusion, final_verdict handles low_bar/domain_risk. The spec's mention of 'low_bar pass' for GO and 'low_bar blocked' for BLOCKED is satisfied at the final_verdict layer, not the fused_verdict layer.

Rule_4_risky.code: if novelty == 'reject' and tailor_verdict == 'GO': return ('RISKY', 'novelty rejected but engineering viable')

Rule_5_conditional_revise.code: if 'revise' in (seed_audit, tailor_gate, final_review): return ('CONDITIONAL', 'gates requested revision')

Rule_7_go.spec: GO when all gates=pass + novelty=accepted + no open critical gaps
Rule_7_go.code: if seed_audit=='pass' and tailor_gate=='pass' and final_review=='pass' and novelty=='accepted' and not _has_open_critical_gap(state): return ('GO', 'all checks passed')

subtask_14_7_fused_verdict_rules_correct.low_bar_handling_note: low_bar=blocked is handled by _compute_final_verdict (separate function, lines 438-500), not by _compute_fused_verdict. This is a deliberate design separation: fused_verdict handles gate+novelty+gap fusion; final_verdict handles low_bar+domain_risk. The spec's 'low_bar pass for GO' / 'low_bar blocked for BLOCKED' is enforced at the final_verdict layer (lines 478-486). No contradiction with spec intent.

overall_summary: WP4 verdict consistency verification on WP1 round 4 data (commit 140e4af7) + WP3 Task 13 schema extension (commit 21f0ed73). 5/7 SubTasks PASS: 14.1 (no empty-field BLOCKED), 14.4 (satisfied gap traceability), 14.5 (novelty/tailor/low_bar consistency), 14.6 (no quality_pass+BLOCKED contradiction), 14.7 (fused_verdict rule correctness). 2/7 SubTasks FAIL: 14.2 (0/3 CONDITIONAL/RISKY/GO) and 14.3 (0/3 quality_pass=true). Both FAILs are EXPECTED and attributable to WP2 scope (seed_audit_gate independent BLOCKED in xlm_r and yolo_steel; tailor_gate rule cap in vit_dr due to final_review_gate repair loop). They are NON-BLOCKING for Re8.1 overall closure. The fused_verdict decision logic in content.py:585-652 is correct and consistent with spec. The quality_pass hard constraint (quality_pass=false when fused_verdict=BLOCKED) is correctly enforced. All 15 satisfied evidence gaps across 3 cases have traceable evidence_delta in search_steps. Verdict: PARTIAL — Re8.1 WP4 can close; remaining BLOCKED conditions are WP2 deliverables.

non_blocking_issues.description: 0/3 cases reached CONDITIONAL/RISKY/GO. All 3 cases have fused_verdict=BLOCKED.
non_blocking_issues.root_cause: xlm_r and yolo_steel: seed_audit_gate independently blocked (S1 BERT title mismatch / S2 Song&Yan ambiguous) — WP2 scope. vit_dr: tailor_gate rule cap due to final_review_gate repair loop re-triggering tailor_gate to round_idx=2 (LLM converged pass in rounds 0+1 but rule cap hit).
non_blocking_issues.fix_path: WP2 seed_audit_gate repair (resolve S1 BERT and S2 Song&Yan existence_status). For vit_dr routing issue: consider not re-triggering tailor_gate when LLM already returned pass (route final_review_gate repair directly to evidence_context).

non_blocking_issues.root_cause: quality_pass is hard-coded false when fused_verdict=BLOCKED (enforced by _compute_quality_pass Check 4). Since all 3 cases have fused_verdict=BLOCKED (NB-1), quality_pass is necessarily false.
non_blocking_issues.fix_path: Resolves automatically once NB-1 is fixed (WP2 seed_audit_gate passes -> fused_verdict upgrades to RISKY/CONDITIONAL -> quality_pass can become true).

non_blocking_issues.description: low_bar=blocked is not directly checked in _compute_fused_verdict. It is handled by the separate _compute_final_verdict function.
non_blocking_issues.root_cause: Design separation: fused_verdict focuses on gate+novelty+gap fusion; final_verdict handles low_bar+domain_risk. Spec mentions low_bar in fused_verdict rules but the enforcement is at final_verdict layer.
non_blocking_issues.fix_path: Optional: document the fused_verdict vs final_verdict responsibility split in spec to remove ambiguity.

recommendations: PRIMARY: Re8.1 WP4 can close as PARTIAL. The 2 FAIL SubTasks (14.2, 14.3) are WP2 scope and explicitly anticipated in the spec. No blocking issues remain for Re8.1.

NEXT WP: Proceed to WP2 (seed_audit_gate repair). xlm_r (S1 BERT title mismatch) and yolo_steel (S2 Song&Yan ambiguous) are the two seed_audit_gate blockers. Once WP2 resolves these, fused_verdict will upgrade from BLOCKED to RISKY/CONDITIONAL for at least 2/3 cases, automatically satisfying SubTask 14.2 and 14.3.

FUTURE FIX (non-blocking, routing optimization): vit_dr tailor_gate final verdict=unresolved despite LLM returning pass in rounds 0+1. Root cause: final_review_gate repair loop re-triggers tailor_gate to cap. Recommend: (a) when tailor_gate LLM returns pass, do NOT re-enter tailor_gate on final_review_gate repair (route final_review_gate repair directly to evidence_context without re-triggering tailor_gate); or (b) reset tailor_gate round_idx when final_review_gate triggers repair. This is a routing mechanic issue, not a correctness issue.
VERIFIED: fused_verdict decision logic (content.py:585-652) is correct and consistent with spec. 8-rule cascade properly encodes GO/CONDITIONAL/RISKY/BLOCKED semantics with correct precedence.
VERIFIED: quality_pass hard constraint enforced (re80_seeded_demo.py:303-308). No quality_pass=true + fused_verdict=BLOCKED contradiction in any case.
VERIFIED: All 15 satisfied evidence gaps across 3 cases have traceable evidence_delta (n_new_papers > 0 or n_new_repos > 0) in search_steps. Gap-to-step attribution is complete.
VERIFIED: novelty/tailor/low_bar signals are internally consistent across all 3 cases. No conflicts detected.
DOCUMENTATION: Optionally clarify in spec that low_bar=blocked is handled by _compute_final_verdict (not _compute_fused_verdict) to remove the spec-vs-code ambiguity noted in NB-3.

verification_metadata.verification_method: static analysis of WP1 round 4 data + code review of content.py:585-652 and re80_seeded_demo.py:213-330
